what_it_does: Defines a self-contained runtime library of pure SVG/HTML generator functions under global.DNA.org that produce token-coloured visual organisms (icons, networks, graphs, charts, phase strips, matrices, connectors, taxonomy diagrams, design/file/plan/project/version/source/evidence/interface/artifact visuals, board groups, constellations, and nav rails) from data and options, using only CSS custom properties for colour.
observations: Every public function returns an SVG or HTML string, not a DOM node.
Colour is resolved entirely through CSS custom properties such as --gold, --bronze-line, --page, --nested, etc.
A deterministic seeded mulberry32 PRNG is used for reproducible mesh and graph layouts.
Icons are stored as inline path strings in a local P dictionary and rendered on a 24-grid.
The graph function implements a radial/containment projection with folder orbit dots, type-coloured file nodes, curved dependency traces, and selection rings.

A whole artefact family (designLibraryObject, fileStack, planThumbnail, projectTileGrid, versionStack, sourcePanelVisual, interfaceFragment, artifactFlow, artifactCluster) provides synthetic or real-asset visuals.
Several small HTML-escaping helpers are redefined in different scopes.
Generated SVGs include aria-label attributes and viewBox-based sizing.
standouts: The graph organism with folder orbit dots and deterministic radial layout.
The artefact family that synthesises material-density visuals from tokens or accepts real image assets.
The strict token-only colour contract across every generator.
Deterministic seeded rendering for weather-like ambient meshes.
conventions: Pure functions that return markup strings.
CSS custom properties as the single colour contract.
Inline SVG generation with viewBox and max-width:100% for responsiveness.
Global namespace attachment via global.DNA = global.DNA || {}.
Optional dependency injection for DNA.iconSVG and DNA.ordinal.
Comments record design rationale and named decisions.
concerns: esc is reimplemented in multiple scopes instead of shared.
The file is large and mixes many visual responsibilities.
Inline style strings in generated HTML make future theming harder to audit.
Some functions reference global DNA without robust fallback beyond typeof checks.
Input values are not validated before numeric operations and could produce NaN coordinates.
notes: A runtime visual-grammar file that turns data and CSS tokens into deterministic SVG/HTML organisms for a design-system surface.
questions: Where are the required CSS token names (--warmpole-*, --dna-shadow-lift-*, etc.) defined and versioned?
How are DNA.iconSVG and DNA.ordinal provided at runtime?
What is the exact schema for graph tree.childrenOf and node objects?
How is interactivity (pan, zoom, tap, selection) wired around the graph output?
Are these strings rendered server-side, client-side, or both?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches the header's stated purpose and extends it with additional dashboard, board, transcript, and artefact-family organisms.
apparent_themes: Separation of pure generators from view state
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to build a complete, code-generated visual language for a design-system surface so that illustrations, diagrams, and UI chrome can be produced from data and theme tokens rather than static assets.
novelty: A self-contained runtime that generates deterministic seeded network and repo-graph visuals, folder-orbit type-composition dots, and rich synthetic or real-backed asset thumbnails from CSS tokens alone.
contribution: A library of pure markup generators that surfaces can call to render icons, charts, graphs, phase indicators, comparison matrices, connectors, taxonomy transitions, and both synthetic and real-backed asset visuals consistently through a shared token contract.
summary_for_embedding: surface/runtime/organisms.js is a pure JavaScript runtime library that generates deterministic, CSS-token-coloured SVG and HTML visual organisms (icons, networks, graphs, charts, phase strips, matrices, connectors, and synthetic or real asset thumbnails) under global.DNA.org.
intention_for_embedding: To provide a self-contained, theme-aware visual grammar so surfaces can render consistent, data-driven illustrations from code rather than static assets.

symbols.does: Renders a single 24x24 drafted icon as an SVG string.
symbols.description: Looks up the named path in the inline P dictionary and wraps it in an SVG with configurable size and stroke colour, defaulting to var(--bronze-line).

symbols.does: Lays out multiple icons on a dashed rail.
symbols.description: Arranges named icons horizontally with connecting dashed lines and an optional descend-to-plug marker, returning a single SVG.

symbols.does: Seeded deterministic PRNG.
symbols.description: Returns a closure that yields pseudo-random numbers in [0,1) from a 32-bit seed, used to make visual weather reproducible.

symbols.does: Generates an ambient network SVG.
symbols.description: Places seeded nodes across a rectangle, links each to its nearest forward neighbours, and colours nodes by distance from a heart point using gold, ochre, and bronze tokens.

symbols.does: Computes node colour based on heart distance.
symbols.description: Local helper inside mesh that maps a point's distance from the heart to one of the warm token colours.

symbols.does: Renders a typed hub with radial spokes.
symbols.description: Draws a central polygon hub connected to labelled satellite nodes arranged in a circle, with deterministic organic jitter and optional score-based proximity and opacity.

symbols.does: Builds a density panel of figures and labels.
symbols.description: Returns an HTML box with a small-caps title and rows of bold figures paired with explanatory text, styled with token colours.

symbols.does: Draws a vertical time-spine stage diagram.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG with a dashed spine, stage labels, boxes, and connecting elbows.

symbols.does: Renders tiny entries as a texture line.
symbols.description: Joins an array of strings with middots in a monospaced, faint-coloured HTML strip.

symbols.does: Draws chevron phase segments with one active.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG of connected chevron shapes where the active index is filled with goldwash and the rest are outlined.

symbols.does: Builds one chevron segment.
symbols.description: Local helper inside phaseStrip that computes the chevron polygon and text for a single phase label.

symbols.does: Renders a quote with attribution.
symbols.description: Returns an HTML block with gold quotation marks, italic quote text, and a bold attribution, optionally framed.

symbols.does: Renders a comparison table with checks and crosses.
symbols.description: Builds an HTML table whose columns and rows use gold checks, muted-red crosses, and goldwash highlighting for a selected self column.

symbols.does: Returns CSS highlight for a selected matrix column.
symbols.description: Local helper inside checkMatrix that emits a goldwash background style when the column index matches the self column.

symbols.does: Draws a donut chart from segments.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG donut ring using stroke-dasharray to represent proportional values, with optional center text and per-segment colours.

symbols.does: Draws a simple bar chart.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG bar chart normalising values against the maximum and optionally sampling the ordinal colour ramp.

symbols.does: Resolves an ordinal colour token.
symbols.description: Falls back to DNA.ordinal if available, otherwise maps an index to a fixed warm-token ramp.

symbols.does: Renders a radial repo/containment graph.
symbols.description: Projects a folder/file tree into deterministic sibling columns along the screen's long axis, with folder orbit dots, type-coloured file nodes, curved dependency traces, and state-based selection rings.

symbols.does: Reads children of a tree address.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that returns the childrenOf array for a given address or an empty array.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML entities.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that replaces &, <, >, and double-quote with entity references for safe insertion into generated markup.

symbols.does: Middle-truncates file labels.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that shortens long labels while preserving the extension so similar filenames remain distinguishable.

symbols.does: Computes depth-axis coordinate.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that positions a column along the shorter depth axis based on its index.

symbols.does: Draws type-coloured orbit dots around folders.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that arranges small dots around a folder icon, one per child, grouped by type in concentric rings with a dir/file divider.

symbols.does: Draws a single graph node group.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that emits a transform group containing a disc, optional icon, label, selection ring, and folder orbit, with token-based colours and opacity.

symbols.does: Draws a curved graph trace with arrowhead.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that emits a quadratic bezier link between two points, optionally animated and gold-highlighted, with an arrowhead near the target.

symbols.does: Filters and sorts graph column items.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that applies a query filter and address sort to the raw children of a parent.

symbols.does: Computes sibling-axis coordinate.
symbols.description: Local helper inside graph that centres a column under its parent's sibling coordinate or spreads from the margin.

symbols.does: Renders a socket-to-plug connector SVG.
symbols.description: Draws a bronze socket ring, dashed transport line, and gold octagon plug with prongs and glow, used as an authorization or movement joint.

symbols.does: Visualises provisional vs real kinds.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG showing dashed ghost pills on the left giving way to filled emerged pills on the right, with dashed transition arrows.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML entities.
symbols.description: Local helper inside taxonomyEmergence that sanitises labels for safe SVG text insertion.

symbols.does: Computes vertical pill position.
symbols.description: Local helper inside taxonomyEmergence that centres a pill within its column's available height.

symbols.does: Renders a grid of design thumbnails.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG tile grid with synthetic warm cover bands or real image covers, one highlighted tile, and an optional plus badge.

symbols.does: Draws a synthetic design tile cover.
symbols.description: Local helper inside designLibraryObject that produces abstract cover shapes and caption lines for a tile when no real cover is provided.

symbols.does: Renders a stack of document pages.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG of offset pages with content lines and a single gold dog-ear on the front page.

symbols.does: Renders a blueprint floor-plan thumbnail.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG with grid, poché walls, door swing, dimension line, title block, and a single gold focal marker.

symbols.does: Draws a filled plan wall rectangle.
symbols.description: Local helper inside planThumbnail that emits a poché wall rect.

symbols.does: Renders a grid of project cards.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG grid of warm-cover cards with label bars and one highlighted card.

symbols.does: Renders version history rows.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG list on a lineage spine with thumbnail chips and a gold-marked current version.

symbols.does: Renders a framed real or synthetic image panel.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG that either embeds a real image or draws a rich synthetic golden-hour architecture scene, with a gold dot marking real assets.

symbols.does: Renders a strip of statistic chips.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG row of figure/label pairs separated by faint dividers, using muted gold for figures.

symbols.does: Renders a mini app UI chrome.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG of a window title bar, sidebar rail, content cards, and a single gold primary button.

symbols.does: Renders an input-process-output flow.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG of connected nodes where the final output node is gold-accented.

symbols.does: Composes artefact visuals into a desk hero.
symbols.description: Returns an HTML container that layers source panel, plan, file stack, library, and UI fragments with shadows and rotation for material-density depth.

symbols.does: Positions a cluster layer element.
symbols.description: Local helper inside artifactCluster that returns an absolutely-positioned div wrapper with rotation, shadow, and z-index.

symbols.does: Renders grouped board cards.
symbols.description: Returns an HTML grid of group sections with headers, counts, and item rows showing labels, channels, and state badges.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML entities.
symbols.description: Local helper inside boardGroups that sanitises labels, channels, and states for safe HTML insertion.

symbols.does: Chooses colour for an item state.
symbols.description: Local helper inside boardGroups that maps active, living, open, or pending states to gold and others to secondary.

symbols.does: Renders a transcript star-field.
symbols.description: Returns an SVG of either grounded theme-stars with claim satellites or a phyllotaxis galaxy of session nodes, with brightness-based sizing and optional degraded fallback notice.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML entities.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that sanitises labels and aria text for safe SVG insertion.

symbols.does: Truncates labels for display.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that shortens long labels with an ellipsis.

symbols.does: Chooses colour for a node status.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that maps live or active statuses to gold-pop, closed to bronze, and others to ochre.

symbols.does: Draws a labelled star node.
symbols.description: Local helper inside constellation that emits a glow circle, core circle, and optional label for a transcript node.

symbols.does: Renders a navigation rail of icon+label tiles.
symbols.description: Returns an HTML nav element containing button tiles with optional injected icons, human labels, and an active gold state.

symbols.does: Escapes HTML entities.
symbols.description: Local helper inside navRail that sanitises labels and navigation IDs for safe HTML insertion.
